column1: Luke whats up brotha its Spiffy over with Spring Break U
we got your chat on our site, looking to get things squared away for the group?
Yea there 3 of us and we're looking to stay at Punta Cana
Word I'll be in Punta Cana too. happy to hook it up
Okay bet yea we have a few groups from there rollin with us. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
As soon as possible, and yea we definitely like to party
as you should! and okay bet I'll send this over rn and then we can look at the next steps getting things set up
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
word whats the best email to send to?
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Also how much would it be if flight is included
so flights are a lot cheaper to get separately on your own. you'll save like 150-200 bucks
I can help you find a good flight to buy tho
Ok yea it's chill I can find a flight if it's cheaper that way
wordd. yea def the best way to do it
Also are the other dates to go that week or is that the best time to go 7-11th
yea we can do any dates youd like tbh. most ppl fly in the 7th and 8th that week
but we can do any start date
Ok sounds good we will stick with the 7th then
Is the party pass worth it or nah
personally I think so, but you have time to decide. that can be added in up to 2 days before the trip
So I submitted the quote request, is there anything else I need to do
I saw you made a reservation from the quote. when were y'all lookin to lock it in?
Word the Riu has a requirement for one person in each room to be 21 for check in. one of you 21?
Yea, is it Alr if not all of are cuz 2 of us are 21 and one of us isn't
yea thats straight y'all all good!
Also which one is better in your opinion party wise occidental or riu
ill personally be at the Occidental Punta Cana. both are super dope tho, slightly different vibes. the Occ Punta Cana leans a little more college than the Riu
Ok shit, well I might do that one then, definitely want a more college vibe
Ok I submitted the occidental instead
Word so we wanna roll with occidental punta cana? ill send over the reservation to your email
Question, it says 4 night I pressed the 5 night stay is that the same thing
5 night stay would be 7th to 12th. we wanna do that instead?
Yea definitely, what's the price difference too, sorry I thought I had it right the first time
its $829 per person for the 5 night. instead of the $670
Ok let me talk to my friends and I'll get back to you, also I think we're gonna get everything done tmrw so I'll let you know then
yoo Luke whats good bro, how things lookin on your end?
Good we finalizing everything later today
ok bet, did you want me to get a reservation started?
Yea we are gonna stick with the 4 nights
aight bet. ill send the link over, same as before
Hey on the summary it says 5 nights it's supposed to be 4 nights
apologies ill adjust that. we wanna do march 7-11?
word that links all updated now
Quick question it says 830 at the bottom but 670 at the top not sure what the price is
Hmm I'll take a look at that. it's $670 tho. your first payment is $200 and second payment will be $470
you dont have to pay any more than that
Ok sounds good just want to make sure, also is the first payment due today 100% or can I pay it whenever
yea first payment is due today to get you reserved
Quick question on my account I'm bouta pay the last amount for the trip but it says unpaid for the first 200 dollars is that Alr
yea its all good we've had a error in our system, youre all good tho!
Hey, so when will we get the rest of our information about spring break it's only a week away and we haven't heard much
whats up brotha, I'll check your reservation in the morning and see whats been sent out so far
Gotchu, Jlmk about when anything that will be sent out, and if anything has
Liked “whats up brotha, I'll check your reservation in the morning and see whats been sent out so far”
were y'all lookin to add the party pass or anything to your accounts?
Not sure how much is it

so you can do either individual events or like bundle packages all together. they come with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off-resort hosted nightclub nights
in my opinion, def worth it. the resort is cool for sure but it adds another experience for the group. even if its one night
safe travels broo. big day, see y'all out here
